raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Executive impact","name":"Which initiative is most likely to move the business in a visible way this quarter?","description":"Surfaces where Darren sees real business leverage, not just activity.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off call","name":"What are you choosing not to push on right now?","description":"Forces a concrete trade-off and reveals what is being deprioritised.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision bottleneck","name":"Where do decisions still slow down in practice?","description":"Finds the real operating bottleneck in a senior leadership context.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Energy drain","name":"What part of your week is taking more out of you than it should?","description":"Locates hidden drains on energy that may not show up as explicit blockers.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recovery check","name":"What does recovery actually look like for you between intense stretches?","description":"Checks whether the pace is sustainable and whether recovery is real or theoretical.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Ownership signal","name":"Where have you found yourself leaning in without being asked?","description":"Looks for organic ownership and initiative beyond assigned work.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch edge","name":"What part of your role feels most like a stretch right now?","description":"Identifies current growth pressure and whether the stretch is productive.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback quality","name":"What feedback would actually help you level up fastest?","description":"Surfaces the kind of input that would be most useful for development.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What would be most useful for me to take off your plate?","description":"Clarifies what support would create the most leverage from the manager side.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Strategic risk","name":"Where do you think we are underestimating risk right now?","description":"Tests strategic judgment and surfaces blind spots in current plans.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
